AdditionalAttributes.description:
Leggo’s Bolognese Pasta Sauce with Red Wine brings a delicious twist to your classic bolognese. This rich, hearty sauce blends the classic flavours of tomatoes, herbs, and a splash of red wine, making it the perfect addition to your favourite pasta.

Made with Australian-grown tomatoes and proudly Australian-made, this sauce is packed with flavour and is sure to become a family favourite. Containing no artificial preservatives, flavours, or colors, ensuring a wholesome and delicious meal every time perfect for feeding the whole family or sharing with friends.

Simply pair it with your favourite pasta for a satisfying, savory dinner that’s quick and easy to prepare. Whether you're cooking a weeknight meal or hosting a special gathering, Leggo’s Bolognese Pasta Sauce with Red Wine delivers a rich, flavourful dish that’s perfect for everyone. This is the pasta sauce you didn't know you were looking for - big on taste, free from artificial additives, and made with the goodness of local ingredients!

- Made in Australia with Australian grown tomatoes
- No Artificial colours or flavours
- No added preservatives
- 4 Health Star Rating
- Suitable for vegans and vegetarians

When it comes to Italian food, Aussies love to do it their way - Leggo’s are here to celebrate Aussie twists on classic Italian recipes! Leggo's has been Australian made with quality ingredients for over 130 years - It’s How We Do Italian.
